texto: A balanced diet and physical activity are vital to academic performance. A healthy diet has a direct link to increased cognitive function and memory skills, decreased absenteeism from school, and improved mood. These advantages can help students stay focused and complete their coursework.

A healthy diet has a direct link to increased cognitive function and memory skills, decreased absenteeism from school, and improved mood.
